meaning: n.[植] 马蹄莲,水芋,荷兰海芋
examples: The calla lily is simple, as all elegant things.

"You get this feeling I can do whatever I want, you know, nothing is going to really hold me back, " said student Calla Chang.
Designer Calla Haynes hails from Toronto, but she lives and works in Paris, and her line has a refined sensibility that belies its two years of existence.
